page_title: Hisshou Pachinko ★ Pachislot Kouryaku Series Vol. 13: Neon Genesis Evangelion 〜That time has come, now they're waiting for us〜
text:
is pachislot simulation game based on the Neon Genesis Evangelion ～Yakusoku no Toki～ machine, released on 18 December 2008 (PlayStation 2) and on 04 December 2008 (Nintendo DS) by D3 Publisher.
